/usr/bin/ar qc libvino_desktop_core.a CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/core/Blueprint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/core/DeviceRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/network/BatchGateway.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/network/Controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/network/PostGateway.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/protocol/MiniJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/protocol/Protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/ui/DesktopRuntime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vino_desktop_core.dir/src/ui/FuturisticTheme.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvino_desktop_core.a
